message:
test(bd-1d2h): add unit tests for fastmcp-macros helper functions

Cover pure helper functions in the proc-macro crate:
- parse_duration_to_millis: single units, empty/whitespace, missing unit,
  unit without number, unknown unit, unexpected char, zero, whitespace
  between components, trimmed input (9 new → 12 total)
- extract_template_params: basic multi-param, no params, single param,
  adjacent braces, empty braces skipped (5 new)
- to_pascal_case: single word, snake_case, already PascalCase, empty,
  leading underscore (5 new)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
